name: Sony WH-CH520 Wireless Headphones
description: Lightweight Bluetooth headphones with up to 50 hours of battery life and crystal-clear audio.

name: FireBolt Vision Smart Watch
description: 1.85-inch AMOLED display with Bluetooth calling, heart rate monitoring, and multiple sports modes.

description: Compact mechanical gaming keyboard with red LED backlight and durable blue switches.
